column1: #schema: gunit book list v1 — columns are PIPE-separated (|)
#  1 title    2 author    3 status    4 md5/source    5 date    6 calibre_id|se-empty
#  status: (blank)=pending  downloaded  nomatch  failed  quota_blocked  tagged  queued/downloading/completed (legacy)
#  col4: Anna's md5, or se:<author>/<title> for Standard Ebooks rows
#  col6: calibre book id on DONE rows; the literal "se-empty" on quota_blocked/nomatch rows means SE was already searched and had nothing (skip re-search)
#  lines beginning with # are comments; "#tag: NAME[, NAME...]" sets the calibre tags for this whole list
# Booker Prize winners — sample starter list
# Format: author<TAB>title   (status/md5 columns are added by the script)
# Lines starting with # are ignored; blank lines fine.
